global_design_rules.emotional_tone: Cinematic, immersive, expensive, frictionless. It must feel like a flagship paid OTT streaming platform.
global_design_rules.border_radius: rounded-md (Subtle roundness for posters and cards, max 8px. Controls and glass elements should be sharp or slightly rounded).
global_design_rules.glassmorphism: Used selectively on navigation, player overlays, and modals. Must use backdrop-blur-xl with bg-black/60 and a delicate border-white/10.
global_design_rules.hover_states: Interactive elements (movie posters) scale up (scale-105) with ring-2 ring-primary and shadow-2xl. Buttons brighten on hover.
global_design_rules.animations: Framer motion staggered entrances for content rails. Smooth hover transitions (duration-300 ease-out).

typography.font_install_instruction: Import Outfit and Manrope from Google Fonts.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard. Generous p-8 or p-12 for sections. Gap-4 or gap-6 for grid rails.
layout_and_spacing.content_strategy: Use 'Content Rails' (horizontal scrolling carousels) for categories like Netflix. Use immersive hero banners spanning the full top width.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Desktop: Fixed Left Sidebar (w-16 or w-20 collapsed, expands to w-64 on hover, z-50). Mobile: Fixed Bottom Navigation. Background: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-white/5.
layout_and_spacing.hero_section: Must have a 16:9 or max-h-[85vh] cinematic background. Overlay must be a horizontal gradient: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#050505] via-[#050505]/70 to-transparent to ensure text readability on the left.
layout_and_spacing.epg_grid: Grid layout. Sticky left column for channel logos. Sticky top row for timeline. Cells are border-collapse. Current program highlighted with primary border.

component_guidelines.buttons: Primary: bg-[#E50914] text-white hover:bg-[#F40612] font-semibold. Secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md.
component_guidelines.movie_posters: Aspect ratio 2:3. overflow-hidden rounded-md. Image w-full h-full object-cover. On hover: show play icon overlay.
component_guidelines.tv_series_thumbnails: Aspect ratio 16:9. Used for episodes, live tv previews, and continue watching.
component_guidelines.player_ui: Absolute positioned overlay over the video (z-50). Bottom control bar with play/pause, timeline slider, volume, track selector, PiP, fullscreen. Top bar with back button and title. Auto-hides after 3 seconds of inactivity.
component_guidelines.forms_and_inputs: Login/Settings inputs: bg-[#1E1E1E] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#E50914] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E50914]. Rounded-md.
component_guidelines.data_testid: ALL interactive components MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react for all UI icons (Play, Pause, FastForward, Rewind, Settings, Search, Heart, Tv, Film, Monitor, Cast).

hero_backgrounds.description: Landscape cinematic background for hero or login

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with the custom color tokens and Outfit/Manrope fonts.
Implement a robust routing structure with React Router.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tabs, dropdowns, but heavily customize them to match the dark cinematic theme (remove white backgrounds, use deep #121212 and border-white/10).
Build a custom Video Player component using HLS.js or HTML5 native video with a custom React overlay for controls to match the premium theme.
Ensure the Live TV EPG is highly optimized for scrolling. Use a grid or table layout with sticky headers for time and channels.
Hero sections MUST use the horizontal gradient mask to ensure readability: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#050505] via-[#050505]/80 to-transparent.
Build horizontal content rails (Movie/Series rows) with smooth scrolling and hide scrollbars (scrollbar-width: none).
Implement Xtream Codes login form over a cinematic background.
Add 'data-testid' to every actionable element for testing.
